hero.title: Nutritional support for lasting results
hero.description: Take care of your recovery with personalized nutritional follow-up, practical assessments, clear recommendations, and interventions that track your progress safely.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: Four simple steps to continue your post-surgery care

1.title: Sign up quickly
1.description: Create your account and get immediate access to specialized nutritional support.

2.title: Choose the right nutritionist
2.description: Browse approved post-bariatric professionals and pick who fits your case.

3.title: Receive ongoing support
3.description: Track your progress with personalized adjustments and practical guidance month by month.

4.title: Access your results
4.description: Manage your meal plan, goals, and feedback in one platform.

nutritionistsSection.title: Approved nutritionists
nutritionistsSection.description: Choose from experienced professionals and update your post-operative plan with personalized care and ongoing support.
nutritionistsSection.emptyDesc: We are approving new professionals to expand care and offer even more support for your post-operative journey.
nutritionistsSection.placeholderBio1: Professional specialized in post-surgical diets, food re-education, and ongoing support.
nutritionistsSection.placeholderBio2: Follow-up for patients who travel abroad and need support in multiple languages.
nutritionistsSection.placeholderBio3: Platform with professionals ready to guide every phase of your recovery.

footer.description: Post-bariatric nutritional follow-up for international patients. We connect you to continuity of care when you return home.
footer.note: Nutribar is a nutritional follow-up platform and does not replace in-person medical advice.

nutritionistCard.packMonthlyDescription: 1 initial consultation + 1 follow-up per month, adjustments and message support.
nutritionistCard.packQuarterlyDescription: Initial consultation, 3 reviews, detailed recommendations, and ongoing support.
nutritionistCard.packAnnualDescription: Full program with regular assessments, adjustments, and priority care.
